title: Creature Gallery
tagline: The pixel-cat casting call behind Roaming Kittens — every candidate sprite with its preview, licence, and keep/reject verdict

functionality.name: Candidate sprite previews
functionality.blurb: Shows the pixel-cat sprites that were considered for Roaming Kittens, each with a preview.

functionality.name: Licence on record
functionality.blurb: Records the licence for each candidate sprite alongside its preview.

functionality.name: Keep/reject verdict
functionality.blurb: Gives an explicit keep or reject verdict on every candidate sprite.

functionality.name: Honest research trail
functionality.blurb: Presents the casting-call research trail openly rather than hiding it.

detail_body: This is the pixel-cat casting call behind Roaming Kittens: the candidate sprites that were auditioned to become its cats.
Each candidate is shown with its preview, its licence, and a keep/reject verdict — the research trail shown honestly rather than tidied away.
